skin.text: Itching of palms. Skin as if sunburned, swollen. White spots, intense itching. Lobes of ears and lips swollen

keynotes.text: color="#800000">MANGIFERA INDICA Mango Tree One of the best general remedies for passive hæmorrhages, uterine, renal, gastric, pulmonary and intestinal. Rhinitis, sneezing, pharyngitis, and other acute throat troubles, suffocative sensation as if throat would close. Relaxation of mucous membrane of alimentary canal. Catarrhal and serous discharges, chronic intestinal irritation. Varicose veins. Drowsiness. Atomic conditions, poor circulation, relaxed muscles.
